testcase.name: search
testcase.system-out: Browser Luanched successfully Nebulizer product was searched successfully Clicking on first result is successful Wishlist click is successful Wishlist button click is successful and moved to wishlist page Cart adding is successful Quantity increase is successful Quantity decrease is successful Proceed To checkout button click is successful
